positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully among blooming bioluminescent flowers and roots. The fox has a vibrant, ethereal mane and a subtle, glowing aura. Composition should be centered, with the fox slightly elevated, framed by sweeping botanical elements. Style: Neo-Traditional tattoo art mixed with fine line botanical illustration, featuring deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) accented by glowing cyan and gold highlights. Strong silhouette definition, high contrast, designed for optimal single-color or limited-color screen printing. Crisp lines, clean negative space.
